User.title: User
User.description: A user of the Nexus Chat application.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user from Firebase Auth.

username.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

avatar.description: The URL of the user's avatar image.

online.description: Whether the user is currently online.

lastSeen.description: The last time the user was active.

Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: A chat conversation between two or more users.

participants.description: The UIDs of the users in the conversation.

isGroup.description: Whether this is a group chat.

name.description: The name of the group chat (if applicable).

updatedAt.description: The last time the conversation was updated.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A message sent within a conversation.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

content.description: The text content or file URL of the message.

createdAt.description: The time the message was sent.

seen.description: Whether the message has been seen by the recipient.
